news.message: Fall in Love with Star Days 2026!

translations.en: Fall in Love with Star Days 2026!
translations.fr: Tombez sous le charme des Jours Stellaires 2026 !
translations.ja: 星の日2026で恋に落ちよう
translations.zh: 在 2026 星日坠入爱河吧！
translations.ko: 스타 데이즈 2026와 함께 사랑에 푹 빠져보세요!
translations.tc: 透過 2026 星日共墜愛河吧！
translations.th: ตกหลุมรักไปกับเทศกาลวันแห่งดวงดาว 2026

news.message: Buy One Get One Platinum Coupon Feb 17-24

translations.en: Buy One Get One Platinum Coupon Feb 17-24
translations.fr: Coupon Platinum "Un acheté, un offert" : 17-24 fév.
translations.it: Coupon Prendi Due, Paghi Uno 17-24 Febbraio
translations.de: 17.-24. Februar - "Kauf eins, erhalte eins gratis"-Coupon für Platinum
translations.es: Cupón de Platinum "Compra 1, llévate 2" del 17 al 24 de febrero
translations.pt: Platinas: Compre 1, leve 2 entre os dias 17 e 24 de fevereiro
translations.ru: Купон «Купи один, получи второй бесплатно» — с 17 по 24 февраля
translations.pl: Kupon na Platynę "Kup jeden, drugi gratis" od 17 do 24 lutego
translations.tr: 17-24 Şubat Arası Bir Alana Bir Bedava Platinum Kuponu
translations.ja: 2月18日から25日までに「ご購入でもう一点プレゼント」クーポンを獲得しよう
translations.zh: 在美东冬令时间 2 月 17 日至 2 月 24 日期间使用白金买一送一优惠券
translations.tc: 在 2 月 17 日至 24 日期間購買一送一白金優惠券
translations.th: คูปองแพลทินัม ซื้อ 1 แถม 1 ระหว่างวันที่ 17 - 24 กุมภาพันธ์

translations.de: Die Heirloom-Kollektion: Vauban ist jetzt verfügbar
translations.es: Colección Legado de Vauban disponible ya
translations.pt: A Coleção do Legado do Vauban já está disponível
translations.pl: Kolekcja Pamiątkowego Vaubana jest już dostępna
translations.ja: Vauban Heirloomコレクションが登場
translations.zh: Vauban 传家宝组合包现已登场
translations.tc: Vauban 祖傳組合包現已登場
translations.th: คอลเลกชัน Vauban Heirloom วางจำหน่ายแล้ว
เทศกาลตรุษจีน 2026

news.message: Complete All Dagath Alerts Until February 18

translations.en: Complete All Dagath Alerts Until February 18
translations.fr: Terminez toutes les Alertes Dagath jusqu'au 18 février
translations.it: Completa tutte le Allerte Dagath fino al 18 Febbraio
translations.de: Schließe alle Dagath Alarmierungen bis zum 18. Februar ab
translations.es: Completa todas las alertas de Dagath hasta el 18 de febrero
translations.pt: Conclua todos os Alertas da Dagath até o dia 18 de fevereiro
translations.ru: Завершите все Сигналы Тревог Дагас до 18 февраля
translations.pl: Ukończ wszystkie Alarmy Dagath przed 18 lutego
translations.uk: Завершіть всі виклики Даґат до 18 лютого
translations.tr: 18 Şubat'a Kadar Tüm Dagath Süreli Görevlerini Tamamlayın
translations.ja: 2月19日までにすべてのDagathアラートを完了しよう
translations.zh: 在 2 月 18 日前完成所有 Dagath 警報
translations.ko: 북미 시각 2월 18일까지 다가스 얼럿을 완료해 보세요
translations.tc: 在 2 月 18 日前完成所有 Dagath 警報
translations.th: ทำภารกิจแจ้งเตือนของ Dagath ทุกภารกิจให้เสร็จภายใน 18 กุมภาพันธ์นี้

news.message: Warframe on Android is Live in Canada

translations.en: Warframe on Android is Live in Canada
translations.it: Warframe su Android disponibile in Canada
translations.de: Warframe ist jetzt für Android in Kanada verfügbar
translations.es: Warframe para Android ya está disponible en Canadá
translations.pt: O Warframe para Android já está disponível no Canadá
translations.ru: Warframe на Android уже доступен в Канаде
translations.pl: Warframe na Androidzie jest już dostępny w Kanadzie
translations.uk: Warframe на Android уже доступний у Канаді
translations.zh: 安卓版《Warframe》已在加拿大上线
translations.ko: 캐나다에서 안드로이드를 통해 워프레임을 만나보실 수 있습니다
translations.tc: Warframe Android 版已在加拿大登場
translations.th: Warframe บน Android เปิดให้เล่นแล้วในแคนาดา

news.message: Prime Resurgence EoY Event Last Chance Rotation Now Live!

translations.en: Prime Resurgence EoY Event Last Chance Rotation Now Live!
translations.fr: Résurgence Prime spéciale : rotation finale maintenant disponible !
translations.it: Evento di Fine Anno della Risorgenza Prime Rotazione Ultima Possibilità Disponibile Ora!
translations.de: 'Letzte Chance'-Rotation von Prime Rückkehr zum Jahresende-Event ist jetzt live!
translations.es: Evento de fin de año de Resurgimiento Prime: ¡Rotación de última oportunidad ya disponible!
translations.pt: Evento de Fim de Ano da Ressurgência Prime: Rotação de Última Chamada já disponível!
translations.ru: Новогоднее «Возрождение Прайм»: Ротация последнего шанса уже здесь!
translations.pl: Rotacja ostatniej szansy Odrodzenia Prime na koniec roku trwa!
translations.uk: Новорічне прайм-відродження: ротація останньої нагоди вже тут!
translations.tr: Prime Diriliş Yıl Sonu Etkinliği Son Şans Rotasyonu Başladı!
translations.ja: Prime Resurgence 2025年末イベント 最終ローテーション開始
translations.zh: Prime 重生年末活动的最后轮换现已登场！
translations.ko: 프라임 리서전스 연말 이벤트: 마지막 기회 로테이션이 시작되었습니다!
translations.tc: Prime Resurgence 年終活動最後輪替登場！
translations.th: กิจกรรม Prime Resurgence ส่งท้ายปีรอบสุดท้ายเริ่มแล้ว

events.tooltip: Seal fractures across the Orb Vallis

variants.modifierDescription: Only snipers may be used in this mission, any other weapon type is not allowed, and will be removed automatically if equipped.
Eximus units have a much higher spawn rate in this mission. Some of their auras stack.
The tileset has a fire hazard. Warframe health is halved. Meltdown Iminent.

translations.ja: カスタムデカール @ ゼビラ
translations.th: รูปลอกสั่งทำที่ ZEVILA

deviation.name: Hazardous Goods
deviation.description: Amphors deal elemental damage while carried.

risks.name: Alluring Arcocanids
risks.description: As Rogue Arcocanids charge attacks, they pull Warframes towards them.

risks.name: Fortified Foes
risks.description: Guardian Eximus units may be encountered, including Guardian Eximus Necramechs.

risks.name: Entanglement
risks.description: Allies within 4m of slain enemies endure reduced Movement Speed and Parkour Velocity.

deviation.name: Coordinated Front
deviation.description: Eximus units support The Fragmented Tide and its final form.

risks.name: Bolstered Belligerents
risks.description: All enemies have Overguard equal to 50% of their max health.

personalModifiers.name: Ability Overload
personalModifiers.description: Using an Ability opens a Void Rift on top of you.

personalModifiers.name: Powerless
personalModifiers.description: All Abilities are disabled until the squad kills 50 enemies.

personalModifiers.name: Energy Exhaustion
personalModifiers.description: Lose 2 Energy per second for each enemy within 10 meters of you.

deviation.name: Sporogenesis
deviation.description: Techrot Tumors appear near Hell-Scrubbers, increasing the rate of life support decay with each active tumor.

risks.name: Techrot Speed Run
risks.description: All enemies are replaced with Techrot and move much faster.

risks.name: Devil's Bargain
risks.description: Allies within 4m of slain enemies gain 25% Fire Rate at the cost of -50% Ammo Efficiency.

deviation.name: Noise Suppression
deviation.description: Drones fly above Flare, spraying them with Efervon gas.

risks.name: Miasmite Swarm
risks.description: Techrot Miasmites swarm out of the shadows throught the mission.

deviation.name: Thermian Plating
deviation.description: Only Thermian RPGs can damage the tank. Reinforcements that carry Thermian RPGs will arrive during the fight

risks.name: Balloonfest
risks.description: Scaldra Harbingers are more numerous and attack and move more quickly.

risks.name: Corrupted Flesh
risks.description: Techrot enemies are infused with Efervon and take damage over time. They explode when killed and leave behind deadly Efervon in their wake.

personalModifiers.name: Dropped Guard
personalModifiers.description: Warframe and ally Overguard gain reduced by 75%.

personalModifiers.name: Secondary Wounds
personalModifiers.description: Gain 1 Puncture Status Effect every time you take damage.

personalModifiers.name: Permanent Injury
personalModifiers.description: Max health reduced each time health damage is taken

upgrade.title: Emergency Medicine
upgrade.description: All restoration effects provided by Orb pickups increased by 25%.

upgrade.title: Toxic Shot
upgrade.description: Add 25% Gas Status Chance to Primary and Secondary weapons.

upgrade.title: Have A Blast
upgrade.description: Every 10th shot adds 10 Blast stacks on hit.

upgrade.title: Involuntary Transfusion
upgrade.description: Weakpoint kills have a 25% chance to generate an Universal Orb.

upgrade.title: Friendly Fallout
upgrade.description: Attacks from Specters or Companions have a 25% chance to cause Radiation Status.

upgrade.title: Broadened Horizons
upgrade.description: On Energy Pickup increase ability range by 10% for 10s.
